basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) has officially announced the Postdoctoral Position Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates up to 35 years of age who hold a Ph.D. in Number Theory or a Thesis Submission Certificate can submit their applications through email on or before 02 August 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation as per GoI norms is applicable.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Number Theory or Thesis submission certificate
qualification.details: For Postdoctoral Position: Ph.D. degree holders or having Thesis submission certificate in the area of Number Theory

salary_details.details: For Postdoctoral Position: Rs 58000/- per month plus HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Position Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Position Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Position Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: For Postdoctoral Position: Ph.D. degree holders or having Thesis submission certificate in the area of Number Theory

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation as per GoI norms is applicable.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: For Postdoctoral Position: Rs 58000/- per month plus HRA

rows.event: Last Date for receipt of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Position Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Position Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Position?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of the application for the Postdoctoral Position at IIT Ropar is 02 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Postdoctoral Position at IIT Ropar?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Postdoctoral Position in the Indian Institute of Technology Ropar recruitment drive. This is a contractual job opportunity.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Position?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Postdoctoral Position at IIT Ropar is Email. Interested and eligible candidates need to send their applications to the official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Postdoctoral Position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Postdoctoral Position at IIT Ropar is 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India norms for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for Postdoctoral Position?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Ph.D. degree or have a Thesis submission certificate in the area of Number Theory to be eligible for the Postdoctoral Position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Postdoctoral Position at IIT Ropar?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Postdoctoral Position at IIT Ropar will receive a salary of Rs 58000/- per month, along with HRA (House Rent Allowance).

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment. Candidates belonging to General/OBC and SC/ST categories are not required to pay any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Postdoctoral Position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Postdoctoral Position at IIT Ropar involves an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and called for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this Postdoctoral Position?
faq.answer: The job location for the Postdoctoral Position is Rupnagar, Punjab, with the pincode 140001. The organization is the Indian Institute of Technology Ropar.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Ropar?
faq.answer: The official website for the Indian Institute of Technology Ropar is https://www.iitrpr.ac.in/. Candidates can visit this website for more information and updates regarding the recruitment.
